title: rf_health.rs: EMA alpha=1/8 may converge too slowly for highly variable RF
description:
RfHealthMetrics uses an exponential moving average with alpha=1/8 for RSSI and SNR tracking. For rapidly changing RF conditions (mobile nodes, intermittent interference), this may be too slow to reflect current state. Consider making alpha configurable or using a faster default (e.g., 1/4).

File: rust/lichen-core/src/rf_health.rs lines 106-107, 161-162
close_reason: Design suggestion - EMA alpha=1/8 is acceptable default, deferred to future configurability
